opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Top Shelf has no booking tool, contact form, or online scheduling — phone-only contact only.
opportunities.observation: After-hours HVAC calls in Boise go unanswered, sending emergency leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI booking widget to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 without staff involvement.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected despite serving the Treasure Valley seasonal HVAC market.
opportunities.observation: 278 reviews suggest a large customer base receiving zero seasonal tune-up outreach or reminders.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season email and SMS reminders to past customers for furnace and AC tune-ups.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; all inbound contact is phone-only with no tracking system.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call is lost permanently with no follow-up or lead recovery possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call tracking and CRM capture to log, transcribe, and auto-follow-up every inbound call.
